meaning: adj.波状的,摇摆的,起浪的,波动的,不稳的
examples: Curly or wavy hair is a must.
Instead of straight hair, this bob works well with wavy or crimped hair.
Its expanse of red Indian sandstone and wavy ribbons of glass is beautiful.
With his unfettered wavy white curls and unshaven jowls he fittingly resembles a sea captain off-duty.
Its full metal body, enriched by subtle wavy patterns, conveys a sense of timeless elegance.
